---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature address? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution
How would you like this feature to work?

## Alternative Solutions
Have you considered any alternative approaches? What are they?

## Use Case
Describe a specific scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Example
Provide a concrete example of how this would work:

```
User: [message]
Raccy: [expected response]
```

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request.

## Willing to Contribute?
- [ ] I would be willing to implement this feature (with guidance)
- [ ] I can help test this feature once implemented
- [ ] I can help document this feature

## Priority (Your Opinion)
How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - I can't use RaccBuddy effectively without this
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve my experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Just an idea

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This feature aligns with RaccBuddy's privacy-first philosophy
- [ ] I have read the [Roadmap](https://github.com/dcbert/raccbuddy#roadmap)
